name: budget-team-agent
description: BYO LangGraph chat agent. Talks to a mock LLM through the Enterprise agentgateway with a team-scoped JWT. The gateway counts tokens per team and rate-limits at the team budget.

skills.name: Chat
skills.description: Plain chat — every prompt is forwarded to the gateway-fronted LLM. Surfaces 429 verbatim when the team budget is exhausted.
